text.title: Product Discovery Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Product Discovery end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: scope-risks
step.action: List one hypothesis per risk dimension.

step.name: design-tests
step.action: Choose method per risk: interview / prototype / spike / financial model.

step.name: execute
step.action: Run all tests within the time-box; log evidence.

step.name: synthesize
step.action: Score each risk red/yellow/green; aggregate to verdict.

step.name: decide
step.action: Emit go / hold / no-op with rationale.
